kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Rowan, Tapestries, Millpond, and 9 coins belong to different artisans.
Exactly two of Wulfric, the Weaver, the artisan who makes Candles, and the artisan with 5 coins belong to the River Ward.
The Cooper's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the artisan serving the Baron.
Either Wulfric goes with 3 coins or someone in the River Ward goes with Sheriff.
Exactly two members of the Joiners' Guild are in the Market Ward.
Between Tapestries and Oldwall, one goes with Rowan and the other with 7 coins.
Cedric goes with exactly two of Blacksmith, Tapestries, Oldwall, Duke, and 3 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Sheriff; Blacksmith goes with Prince; Tanner goes with Tapestries.
9 coins goes with at least three of Wulfric, Boots, Oldwall, and Duke.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Mabel, Swimbait, Foxglen, and 8 lb belong to different catches.
Exactly two of Wade, the angler who landed the Trout, the angler using the Spoon, and the catch with 4 lb belong to the North Watershed.
The angler who landed the Catfish's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler fishing with Corn.
Either Wade goes with 2 lb or someone in the North Watershed goes with Nightcrawler.
Exactly two members of the Sunfish Family are in the East Watershed.
Between Swimbait and Stillwater, one goes with Mabel and the other with 6 lb.
Boone goes with exactly two of Bass, Swimbait, Stillwater, Dough, and 2 lb.
Exactly one of these is true: Boone goes with Nightcrawler; Bass goes with Maggot; Pike goes with Swimbait.
8 lb goes with at least three of Wade, Spinnerbait, Stillwater, and Dough.
